falsification_conditions.condition: SPX closes above 5,600 on any day in the next 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: The bottom_2024_aug pattern analog is broken; that bottom formation featured lower highs and failed rallies below prior resistance. A clean breakout above 5,600 invalidates the structural similarity and suggests accumulation phase rather than distribution/bottoming

falsification_conditions.condition: VIX closes below 12.50 for 3 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: The blowoff score of 39 implies elevated volatility/uncertainty typical of late-stage bottoms. Sustained VIX compression below 12.50 would signal complacency inconsistent with bottoming dynamics and more characteristic of a resumed bull trend or false bottom

falsification_conditions.condition: 10Y Treasury yield breaks above 4.50% and holds there for 5 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: The August 2024 bottom occurred with yields peaking and rolling over; a sustained yield breakout to new highs would invalidate the macro rate-relief component of the pattern and suggest the 'bottom' was actually a mid-cycle pause in a higher-rate regime

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
